title: SRD Bundle Envelope (meta.json)
description: Pinned shape of the bundle envelope file shipped at <bundle>/meta.json. This is the consumer-visible contract: top-level keys, the schemas map, the datasets manifest, and licensing. Manifest renames (e.g. files→inventory→datasets) are MAJOR builder_version changes and must update this schema's version. See docs/COMPATIBILITY.md for the policy.

source.description: Source identifier for the underlying ruleset (e.g. 'SRD_CC_v5.1').

ruleset_version.description: Game ruleset version (e.g. '5.1'). Distinct from builder_version.

builder_version.description: srd-builder semver. Carries the compatibility contract for this envelope and all shipped schemas. MAJOR = envelope or schema breaking change; MINOR = additive; PATCH = bug fix. See docs/COMPATIBILITY.md.

schemas.description: Per-dataset schema versions. One entry per shipped dataset, keyed by schema name (singular form: 'ability_score', not 'ability_scores').

oneOf.description: Raw hex sha256 of the source PDF, matching the form used in each dataset's _meta.pdf_sha256. One representation across the whole envelope.

extracted_at.description: Optional debug field; envelope itself is timestamp-free (the timestamp_utc lives in dist/build_report.json).

page_index.description: Named page regions of the source document. Each region carries a start/end page span plus a human description; the optional 'dataset' pointer links a region to a dataset name in the datasets manifest.

datasets.description: Dataset manifest. KEY NAME IS THE CONTRACT — earlier builder versions used 'files' then 'inventory'; the current name is 'datasets'. Renames are MAJOR builder_version changes.
